derivation: mechanical projection of frozen multi_asset_trend_risk_budget_v2 caused only by official canonical data availability

signal.prices: official raw plus confirmed point-in-time cash/share action adjustment; signal only
signal.known_information: all features end at prior trading-day close
signal.absolute_trend: prior adjusted close above prior 120-observation simple moving average
signal.volatility: sample standard deviation of 60 prior adjusted-close simple returns

weights.eligible: absolute-trend pass and finite positive volatility
weights.algorithm: iterative water-fill capped at 40%; if fewer than three eligible assets, unallocatable residual remains cash
weights.failed_or_missing: zero target and its capital remains cash

execution.rebalance: first common calendar trading day of each month at official raw open
execution.deposit_beginning: deposit before company-action cash payment and trades
execution.deposit_ending: company actions and trades first; deposit after daily valuation
execution.company_actions: record-date entitlement; official pay-date cash; official share factor effective date
execution.lots: 100 ETF shares and integer futures contracts
execution.suspension: retain holding; frozen target capital is not redistributed
execution.cash_and_margin: single shared ledger; margin unavailable to ETF purchases; daily MTM and immediate margin action
